briefdescription.para: Returns the number of neighbor particles. For ParticleTileRT this is always zero.
Returns the number of neighbor particles. For ParticleTileRT this is always zero.

detaileddescription.para: Get the names for the real SoA components
Get the names for the int SoA components
Get access to the particle id/cpu Arrays
